## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Performance improvement (`perf`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore`)

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`xcodebuild test` or `pytest`)
- [ ] SwiftLint: zero warnings
- [ ] `xcodebuild analyze`: zero issues

## Checklist

- [ ] No force-unwraps introduced
- [ ] No `print()` calls in production Swift files
- [ ] No hardcoded strings — constants in `Constants.swift`
- [ ] New public functions have `///` doc comments
- [ ] Python: `flake8` and `mypy --strict` pass
- [ ] License header present on all new source files
- [ ] Privacy implications considered — no new data leaves the device
